faq.a1: Supafo is a mobile application created to help prevent food waste. It offers products left over at the end of the day by businesses, while still preserving their freshness and quality, to users as discounted “Surprise Packages.”
faq.q2: Why are the package contents a surprise?
faq.a2: The type and quantity of products vary depending on the businesses’ daily sales. This method helps prevent waste at the highest level while also allowing you to buy quality food at a price far below market value.
faq.q3: How can I place an order?
faq.a3: After the active packages from businesses near your selected location are listed in the app, you can add the Surprise Package you like to your cart and complete the secure payment step.
faq.q4: How can I make the payment?
faq.a4: Payments are accepted only through the app, online by card. For your security, we do not store your card information and it is never shared with third parties.
faq.q5: How will I collect the package I purchased?
faq.a5: After completing the payment, go to the business within the specified pickup time window, show your personal QR code in the app, confirm your order, and collect it.
faq.q6: Can I cancel the package I purchased?
faq.a6: No. Since Surprise Packages are time-limited special offers intended to prevent waste, cancellation or changes are not possible after purchase.
faq.q7: What should I do if the package is sold out when I arrive at the business?
faq.a7: If you encounter such a situation, please immediately create a Support Request through the app. The Supafo team will review the issue and provide a full refund or an alternative solution.
faq.q8: What happens if I arrive outside the pickup time?
faq.a8: Businesses guarantee pickup only within the announced pickup time window. If you arrive outside this time range, delivery of your package cannot be guaranteed.
faq.q9: How can I delete or close my account?
faq.a9: To delete your account, go to 'My Profile' > 'My Account Information' and use the 'Delete My Account' button.
faq.q10: How can I contact the Supafo support team?
faq.a10: You can call us through the 'My Profile' > 'Our Support Team' tab in the app or send an email directly to support@supafo.com.

AboutUs.desc_1: At <brand>Supafo</brand>, we started with a simple truth: food is too valuable to be wasted. Every day, tons of fresh and delicious food — from bakery items to restaurant meals — are thrown away for no good reason. This waste is not only an economic loss, but also a serious harm to the planet.
AboutUs.desc_2: <brand>Supafo</brand> is a technology-driven solution to this problem. By helping restaurants and cafes offer their surplus food at incredible discounts, we create a true win-win for businesses, the planet, and you.
AboutUs.mission_desc: Our mission is to build a world where food waste no longer exists and where everyone can easily access quality food at affordable prices. We are not just an app; we are a movement that lets you contribute to a more sustainable future with every purchase you make.
AboutUs.vision_desc: Our vision is to make <brand>Supafo</brand> one of the strongest tools in the global fight against food waste and inspire everyone to make more responsible choices.
AboutUs.principles_title: The principles behind <brand>Supafo</brand> are simple, but powerful:
AboutUs.principle_1_desc: We help protect the planet by preventing tons of CO₂e emissions every day.
AboutUs.principle_2_desc: Using AI, we find the best opportunities and help you save more while also supporting our partners’ growth.
AboutUs.principle_3_desc: We are more than an app; we are a growing community taking action together against food waste.
AboutUs.join_desc: Be part of this movement. Download the app, save delicious meals, and start the change with yourself!

Career.title: Career
Career.subtitle: The Place for People Who Want to Make a Difference
Career.desc_1: We are not just doing a job; we are investing in the future of the planet by fighting food waste. For us, every team member is not just part of the team, but also a source of strength behind this mission. Every step you take at Supafo helps prevent hundreds of thousands of fresh products from going to waste and gives our planet real breathing room.
Career.desc_2: Here, your knowledge and dedication are noticed directly and rewarded with the fast growth you deserve. If you are looking for a purpose-driven career, join us in our mission to make the world a more livable place through technology.
Career.intern_1_subtitle: New opportunities are waiting for you!
Career.intern_2_subtitle: Grow your knowledge and develop your skills!

faq.q1: How does the application process work?
faq.a1: After we receive your application, it is added to our candidate pool. If your profile matches a suitable current or future position, we will contact you and provide information about the process.
faq.a2: Yes. Supafo offers flexible working hours. Some positions are fully remote, while others follow a hybrid work model, combining office and remote work. The applicable working model is specified in the job posting details.
faq.q3: Can I still apply if there are no open positions right now?
faq.a3: Yes, you can. Your application may be stored in our system to be considered for suitable positions that may open in the future.
faq.q4: How long is my CV stored?
faq.a4: The CV and application information you share may be securely stored for a certain period so that you can be considered for suitable future positions.
faq.q5: When will I receive a response after applying?
faq.a5: All applications are carefully reviewed. If your application is found suitable for a current or future position, we will contact you.
faq.a6: Yes. The information you share is stored in accordance with confidentiality and personal data protection rules and is used only for recruitment processes.
faq.q7: Can I update an application I submitted earlier?
faq.a7: If there have been updates to your information or experience, you can share your new CV or updated details with us. Where appropriate, your application may be reconsidered with the updated information.
faq.q8: Can I be considered for more than one position at the same time?
faq.a8: Yes. If your profile is suitable for multiple positions, you may also be considered for different roles.
faq.q9: Can I apply again if my application is not successful?
faq.a9: Yes, you can apply again. Since your experience, skills, or open positions may change over time, your application may be reconsidered in the future.
faq.q10: Which positions are applications evaluated for?
faq.a10: Applications are evaluated according to Supafo’s current and future team needs. Suitability is determined based on experience, skills, and position requirements.
faq.q11: Will additional documents or information be requested after my application?
faq.a11: If necessary, we may contact you to request additional information, documents, or a short preliminary interview.
faq.q12: Can I request that my application be deleted or my information removed?
faq.a12: Yes. If you would like to request an update, deletion, or information regarding your application details, you can contact us.

saplings.title: A Sapling for the Future with <brand>Supafo</brand>
saplings.heroParagraph1: At <brand>Supafo</brand>, we believe that food is not only a need, but also a responsibility. With the Sapling Planting Project we launched with this understanding, we turn every order into a real contribution to nature.
saplings.heroParagraph2: Thanks to this project, you do not just place an order — you also take a step toward a greener future.
saplings.purposeParagraph: As our world changes rapidly, protecting nature is becoming more important than ever. As <brand>Supafo</brand>, our goal is to:
purposeItems: Contribute to reducing the carbon footprint
saplings.howItWorksParagraph: The system is quite simple and effective:
howItWorksItems: Every order placed → supports the planting of 1 sapling
Every bag purchased → provides an extra contribution of 1 sapling
saplings.plantingParagraph1: <brand>Supafo</brand> carries out sapling planting in cooperation with reliable and expert environmental organizations.
saplings.plantingParagraph2: Our goal is to create the <brand>Supafo</brand> Forest. In this way, your contributions turn into real projects.
saplings.contributionParagraph:
A small choice can create a big impact.
With <brand>Supafo</brand>:
contributionItems: You support the protection of nature
You adopt a more sustainable lifestyle

WhatIsFoodWaste.section1Text:
Food waste means that edible food is thrown away without being consumed. In restaurants, cafés, markets, and bakeries, many products can be discarded every day even though they are still fresh, simply because they are not consumed in time.

However, a large portion of these foods is still safe to eat. The problem is often not that the product is spoiled, but that it remained unsold at the end of the day, was overproduced, or is approaching its expiration date.

This is exactly where Supafo steps in.
WhatIsFoodWaste.section2Title: Why Is Food Waste an Important Problem?
WhatIsFoodWaste.section2Text:
Food waste is not only about food being thrown away. It also means that the water, energy, labor, soil, packaging, and transportation resources used to produce that food are wasted as well.

When a product is thrown away, the entire process from production to reaching the table is wasted too. This harms the environment and also causes economic losses.

Less food waste means a cleaner environment, more conscious consumption, and a more sustainable future.
WhatIsFoodWaste.section3Text:
Supafo brings users together with products from restaurants, cafés, bakeries, and markets that remain unsold at the end of the day but are still suitable for consumption.

Businesses offer their surplus products through Supafo as affordable packages. Users discover these packages through the app, purchase them, and pick them up from the business at the specified times.

In this way, businesses make use of their products instead of throwing them away, while users access quality food at more affordable prices.
WhatIsFoodWaste.section4Text:
Every package purchased on Supafo means that food about to be thrown away gains value again.

When these small choices come together, they create a big impact. Less waste, more savings, and a more sustainable life become possible.

With Supafo, you can protect your budget and take a real step against food waste.
WhatIsFoodWaste.section1ImageAlt: Image of fruit and vegetable waste illustrating food waste
WhatIsFoodWaste.section2ImageAlt: Image illustrating the environmental impacts of food waste
WhatIsFoodWaste.section3ImageAlt: Image illustrating the process of reducing food waste with Supafo

hero.title: A smart package experience that reduces food waste
hero.description: <green>Supafo</green> turns unsold but still consumable products into affordable packages. Users discover packages, add them to the cart, and purchase them with a credit card or fast payment options.
hero.imageAlt: Smart package experience that reduces food waste in the Supafo app

audience.title: Users and Partners

audience.description: Users discover affordable packages. Businesses make use of their remaining products. Both sides become part of a more sustainable consumption model.

cartPayment.title: Cart and Payment
cartPayment.heading: The user adds the package to the cart and pays with the method they prefer.
cartPayment.description: The purchase experience on <green>Supafo</green> should be fast and easy to understand. The user adds the package to the cart, checks the pickup time, and pays by credit card or Apple Pay / Google Pay.

miniGame.title: Mini Game
miniGame.heading: Waste or Opportunity?
miniGame.description: At the end of the day, a cafe has 5 croissants left. They are still fresh, but may not be suitable for sale tomorrow. What should happen?

supafo.title: They become a <green>Supafo</green> package
supafo.text: They turn into an opportunity instead of waste.

feedback.wrongTitle: Actually, there is a better way.
feedback.correctText: This product can be listed on <green>Supafo</green> as an affordable package, added to the cart by a user, and used before going to waste.
feedback.wrongText: If these croissants are still consumable, they can be listed as a <green>Supafo</green> package.
